<?php namespace Twilio\Rest; use Twilio\Rest\IpMessaging\V2; class IpMessaging extends IpMessagingBase { /** * @deprecated Use v2->credentials instead. */ protected function getCredentials(): \Twilio\Rest\IpMessaging\V2\CredentialList { echo "credentials is deprecated. Use v2->credentials instead."; return $this->v2->credentials; } /** * @deprecated Use v2->credentials(\$sid) instead. * @param string $sid The sid */ protected function contextCredentials(string $sid): \Twilio\Rest\IpMessaging\V2\CredentialContext { echo "credentials(\$sid) is deprecated. Use v2->credentials(\$sid) instead."; return $this->v2->credentials($sid); } /** * @deprecated Use v2->services instead. */ protected function getServices(): \Twilio\Rest\IpMessaging\V2\ServiceList { echo "services is deprecated. Use v2->services instead."; return $this->v2->services; } /** * @deprecated Use v2->services(\$sid) instead. * @param string $sid The sid */ protected function contextServices(string $sid): \Twilio\Rest\IpMessaging\V2\ServiceContext { echo "services($sid) is deprecated. Use v2->services(\$sid) instead."; return $this->v2->services($sid); } }
